CATALOG_SETTINGS.TITLE: Catalog Settings
CATALOG_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure your catalog visibility and payment options.

ENABLE.TITLE: Enable Catalog
ENABLE.DESCRIPTION: When enabled, the Catalog will be visible in the sidebar for all users.

PAYMENT_PROVIDER.TITLE: Payment Provider
PAYMENT_PROVIDER.DESCRIPTION: Select a payment provider to enable cart functionality. Without a provider, you can only send catalog items as messages.
PAYMENT_PROVIDER.NO_PROVIDER_NOTE: Without a payment provider, you can send catalog items to customers but won't be able to create carts with payment links.

CURRENCY.TITLE: Currency
CURRENCY.DESCRIPTION: Select the currency for your catalog products.

API.ERROR: Failed to update catalog settings. Please try again.

CATALOG_SEND.TITLE: Send Catalog Items
CATALOG_SEND.DESC: Select products to send to the customer.
CATALOG_SEND.ERROR: Failed to send catalog items. Please try again.
